title:

content:
## Results for 'Consistency'
- Managing data changes for comparison over time Any change in the data structure introduces a break in the time series. This is called a discontinuity. Points of discontinuity in a time series must be identified and explained. …

### Managing data changes for comparison over time
Any change in the data structure introduces a break in the time series. This is called a discontinuity. Points of discontinuity in a time series must be identified and explained. …
